<4>Apr 28 04:02:04 host kernel: [   42.012345] BLOCK-OUT IN= OUT=wlan0 SRC=10.0.0.1 DST=10.0.0.2 LEN=40 TTL=64 ID=0 PROTO=UDP SPT=53 DPT=33445
description: Adapted from logstash-plugins/logstash-patterns-core patterns/ecs-v1/firewalls (Apache-2.0), entry IPTABLES. Inlined SYSLOGTIMESTAMP, SYSLOGHOST, IP, INT, MAC, NUMBER, WORD macros into plain PCRE2. The free-form 'prefix' group accepts iptables's `--log-prefix` text.
